title: World Launcher
description: This mod will open up a bunch of possibilities for customizing Minecraft for your maps.
body:
**This mod will open up a bunch of possibilities for customizing Minecraft for your maps.**
**To open the settings menu, press 0 and select "World Launcher".**

Examples of mod features:

- Changing the Minecraft window title and icon
- Ability to set the world to load immediately after startup
- DiscordRPC customization
- Option to set a custom loading logo
- Running a script instead of opening the pause menu (allows custom UI creation)
- Ability to hide spectators

**Mod created by - Neiron111**,
**Special thanks to - MrKoteich**

The mod requires:
- [MixinBooter](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mixin-booter)
- [McLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mchorses-mclib)
